items.name_en: [Chip Version] Model: M43986 VANITY Bag. Inspired by the historic LV Cannes vanity case. Artistic Director Nicolas Ghesquière reimagines the charm of a classic with this semi-rigid bag. Small size. Monogram and Monogram Reverse coated canvas mix. Distinctive Louis Vuitton design. Very elegant. Features a top handle and detachable leather shoulder strap. Multiple carrying options. Size 15x17x15cm

items.name_en: [Chip Version] Model: M83480 Canoé Handbag. Crafted from Monogram canvas, it combines the Noé and Cannes bags, featuring a drawstring from the former and a molded bottom from the latter, blending trendy style with practicality. The woven chain and leather shoulder straps are detachable for multiple carrying styles. 14×20.5×14cm

items.name_cn:
[Dynamic Code-Changing Chip, Top-Grade Original Order Enhanced Version]
 Steel eyelet hardware, recognize the picture details for top-grade original order M46581 Monogram, Mini Bucket Bag series NÉONOÉ BB Handbag. A Neono embellished with natural leather on Monogram canvas. The iconic Neono reinterprets the bucket bag into a small size design. Sufficient storage space for keys, AirPods, and iPhone. Securely holds items with a leather cord. Multiple styles possible with removable handle and removable, adjustable strap. 20 x 20 x 13 cm

items.name_en: [Factory Version] Chanel 23A Mini 31bag Green Tweed
items.name_cn:
[Factory Version] Chanel 23A Mini 31bag Green Tweed
A fluffy teddy style~ Did this grow up eating cute things!! The new 31bag has a plush version, who can resist this! A limited item for Autumn/Winter, the level of popularity is obvious, incredibly soft touch, full of retro sentiment, the essence of the 31 is the lazy feel after folding~ Freshness as a shoulder bag or handbag, the calfskin body is amazing, the combination of leather chain and leather thin shoulder strap is just too lovely~
Size: 22*23*5.5cm
Model: AS4133

items.name_en: [Genuine Leather] #LouLou puffer# LOULOU PUFFER Mini Quilted Lambskin Bag, a super hot style with the latest mini size from the counter! Made with genuine ZP leather, soft and delicate to the touch, small and cute like a marshmallow when carried!
